ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., annotator, reviewer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image belongs to */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "resolution_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "resolution_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the image (e.g., pending, annotated, reviewed) */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the annotation belongs to */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label for the annotation */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the annotation (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., car, person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the label belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., vehicles, people) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bounding_boxes" (
  "bbox_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bounding box */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation the bounding box belongs to */,
  "anchor_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the anchor point */,
  "anchor_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the anchor point */,
  "bb_min_y" REAL /* Minimum Y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "bb_min_x" REAL /* Minimum X-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "bb_max_y" REAL /* Maximum Y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "bb_max_x" REAL /* Maximum X-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "n_pixels" INTEGER /* Number of pixels within the bounding box */,
  "rotation_angle" REAL /* Rotation angle of the bounding box */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbox_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounding_boxes_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., annotator, reviewer, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image review */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_reviews_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation review */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_reviews_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation version */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the annotation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_versions_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., annotator, reviewer, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the project category (e.g., autonomous driving, security systems) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object accessed (e.g., project, image, annotation) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
